lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: First report this cycle with real movement: the milestone-hardcode MEDIUM that rode three straight reports is fixed in the working tree (write-dashboard-status.ps1 now reads the milestone from .project-context.json instead of hardcoding M2), and two genuine test files landed covering the stated gaps (schedule-e2e.test.ts route-level E2E and schedule-fill.realistic.test.ts, a 10-invariant auto-fill suite). The catch is none of it is committed: HEAD is still 23d2e3d (2026-06-08) for the third report running, so from a shipped-state view nothing closed and the work sits uncommitted on a FUSE mount. Two doc-or-script MEDIUMs still ride in HEAD (the discord-notify.ps1 em-dash sanitizer targets the mojibake form not [char]0x2014, and DESIGN.md is still v0.3.0 against package.json 0.4.1), and the version drift widened to a three-way milestone disagreement now that .project-context.json says M8 shipped while DESIGN.md says M7.1 pending. One commit lands the fix plus the tests and flips this to healthy.
